ensures.text: exists sw: bool {:trigger ValidSwapChoice(a_i, b_i, c_i, sw)} :: ValidSwapChoice(a_i, b_i, c_i, sw)
exists sw: bool {:trigger ValidSwapChoice(a_i, b_i, c_i, sw)} :: ValidSwapChoice(a_i, b_i, c_i, sw)
!exists sw: bool {:trigger ValidSwapChoice(a_i, b_i, c_i, sw)} :: ValidSwapChoice(a_i, b_i, c_i, sw)
!exists sw: bool {:trigger ValidSwapChoice(a_i, b_i, c_i, sw)} :: ValidSwapChoice(a_i, b_i, c_i, sw)

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger c[i]} {:trigger b[i]} {:trigger a[i]} | 0 <= i < |a| :: HasValidSwapAtPos(a[i], b[i], c[i])
forall i: int {:trigger c[i]} {:trigger b[i]} {:trigger a[i]} | 0 <= i < |a| :: HasValidSwapAtPos(a[i], b[i], c[i])

foralls.ensures: exists swapWithA: bool {:trigger ValidSwapChoice(a[i], b[i], c[i], swapWithA)} :: ValidSwapChoice(a[i], b[i], c[i], swapWithA)

invariants.text: forall j: int {:trigger c[j]} {:trigger b[j]} {:trigger a[j]} | 0 <= j < i :: HasValidSwapAtPos(a[j], b[j], c[j])
